author: gb9t
content: Iter 62 result: kernel/sched/wait.md (waitqueue + bit-wait + completion - wait.c ~465 + wait_bit.c ~278 + wait.h + completion.c; per-(condition) wqh + wqe with default_wake/autoremove_wake func + WQ_FLAG_EXCLUSIVE thundering-herd defense + wake_q batched defer + wait_bit hash table + Completion done counter + wait_event macro pattern with prepare→check→schedule) + virt/kvm/x86-steal-time.md (KVM_FEATURE_STEAL_TIME paravirt - in x86.c ~400-500 lines; 64-byte control-page with steal/version/flags/preempted + version sequence-counter atomic + per-vmexit set_preempted + per-vmenter record_steal_time + KVM_VCPU_PREEMPTED bit for PV qspinlock optimization + KVM_VCPU_FLUSH_TLB hint). 74 Tier-3s total. Next iter: kernel/cgroup/cgroup.md (cgroup core hierarchy) + virt/kvm/x86-pv-ipi.md (PV-IPI + PV-tlb-flush).
